subject: A vintage cathode-ray television set with a ghostly spirit emerging through the screen, reaching outward with a translucent hand
description: A boxy vintage television with rounded corners sits on wooden boards in a cluttered room. The screen glows with electric blue-white static, and from it a ghost or spirit is partially emerging — a wispy translucent figure with flowing hair and features visible in the screen, one arm fully extended outward through the glass plane. The surrounding room is filled with old electronics: speakers, additional monitors and devices, a reel-to-reel or tape deck visible behind. Cables trail on the floor. A small pink spray paint can lies on the ground in the lower left. The overall atmosphere is retro-horror, combining 1970s-80s consumer electronics with supernatural haunting.
foreground: Vintage TV set with ghost emerging from screen, reaching hand forward
background: Cluttered room of stacked old electronics, speakers, tape equipment, wooden walls
animals_creatures: ghost or spirit emerging from screen
emotion: dread of the familiar — the domestic object made horrific, the spirit reaching outward is both beckoning and threatening
